## BuildListQueryBodyArgs.groupKey property

Override for the groupBy key (advisory metadata for the result envelope). The `aggregate.groupKeyExpr` is the canonical source for the OmniJS bucket expression; this parameter is accepted for API symmetry.

**Signature:**

```typescript
groupKey?: string | undefined;
```
